svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/144.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 OPR/128.0.0.0" version="29.6.4" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="kG1_pMyCTs2N0KyDMsvc"> <mxGraphModel dx="2018" dy="1147" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="broker" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="<b>BROKER MQTT</b><br>(Mosquitto)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="120" x="340" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pub_sensor" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="<b>Publisher Capteur</b><br>(publisher_sensor.py)<br>[Télémétrie Temp]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="60" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge1" edge="1" parent="1" source="pub_sensor" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="broker" value="Publish JSON"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sub_led" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="<b>Subscriber LED</b><br>(subscriber_led.py)<br>[Actionneur GPIO]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="320" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge2" edge="1" parent="1" source="sub_led" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="broker" value="Sub: .../cmd
Pub: .../state"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="logger" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="<b>Logger MariaDB</b><br>(logger_mariadb.py)<br>[Persistance]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="320" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge3" edge="1" parent="1" source="logger" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="broker" value="Sub: All Topics"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="database" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="<b>MariaDB</b><br>Tables: telemetry, events" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="120" x="580" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge4" edge="1" parent="1" source="logger" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="database" value="INSERT"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dash" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="<b>MQTT Dash</b><br>(Mobile App UI)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="580" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge5" edge="1" parent="1" source="dash" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="broker" value="Pub: .../cmd
Sub: .../sensors"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));
